title: Operation
description: An Operation is a Resource:Action pair — the unit of user/system interaction at the product level. Product Core Operations are surface projections of Operational Operations; the field name is the same across both layers.

resource.description: The Resource this operation belongs to.

action.description: The Action to be performed on the Resource.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this operation does.

examples.name: Loan.Apply
examples.description: A borrower submits a loan application.

examples.name: Loan.Approve
examples.description: An underwriter approves a pending loan application.
